mapper.select: SELECT A.NWHOIS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SWHOISREQUESTID , A.SAPPLICATIONNAME , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.NCNT , A.SREQUEST_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_CD , A.SWHOISRESULT_MSG , A.SKRNICMEMBER_ID , A.SISP_NM , A.SSAID , A.SLLNM , A.SNET_NM , A.SSCRETE_YN , A.SUSERORGGB , A.SNETTYPE , A.SSERVICEGB , A.SSVCLOC , A.SHOSTNOW , A.SUSEDTLNOW , A.SHOST6MONTH , A.SUSEDTL6MONTH , A.SHOST12MONTH , A.SUSEDTL12MONTH , A.SSVCCOMMNET , A.SREMARK , A.DSEND_DT , A.DRECEIPT_DT , A.DRECEIPTOK_DT , A.DREPLY_DT , A.DREGOK_DT , A.SKRNICNO , A.SKRNICORGCODE , A.SOLD_NET , A.SOLD_TOT_SUBNET , A.SOLD_TOT_HOST , A.SOLD_COMMENT , A.SNET_PLAN , A.STOT_SUBNET , A.STOT_HOST , A.SSVCNETWORK , A.SCITY , A.SCCLASSIP , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SIP_TYPE , B.SNETNAME , B.SORGNAME , B.SADDR , NVL(B.SADDR_DETAIL, ' ') AS SADDR_DETAIL, B.SZIPCODE , B.SEORGNAME , B.SEADDR , NVL(B.SEADDR_DETAIL, ' ') AS SEADDR_DETAIL, B.SADM_NAME , B.SADM_ORGNAME , B.SADM_ADDR , B.SADM_ADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_ZIPCODE , B.SADM_ENAME , B.SADM_EORGNAME , B.SADM_EADDR , B.SADM_EADDR_DETAIL , B.SADM_PHONE , B.SADM_DPPHONE , B.SADM_FAX , B.SADM_EMAIL , B.SFLAG , B.SADDRSEQ , B.SSERIALNO , B.SADM_SERIALNO , B.SECITY , B.SORGTYPE , B.SCUSTNAME FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS A LEFT JOIN BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER B ON B.SSAID = A.SSAID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '01' AND A.SNET_NM = #{snetNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.SREQUEST_CD ASC, A.NWHOIS_SEQ ASC
SELECT NRESULT FROM(SELECT BIF.UF_NEW_WHOIS_DEL_USER( #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NRESULT)

SELECT NVL(B.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ, 0) AS NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , (CASE WHEN C.NWHOIS_SEQ IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS WHOIS_DATA_YN FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN BIF.TB_WHOIS C ON C.SWHOISREQUESTID = A.ssvc_line_type_cd || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.nip_block_mst_seq, '000000000')) || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.nip_assign_mst_seq, '000000000000')) AND C.SWHOISRESULT_CD = '04' WHERE B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND B.SSAID = #{said, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT NVL(C.NWHOIS_SEQ,0) AS NWHOIS_SEQ , (CASE WHEN C.NWHOIS_SEQ IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS WHOIS_DATA_YN FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN BIF.TB_WHOIS C ON C.SWHOISREQUESTID = A.ssvc_line_type_cd || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.nip_block_mst_seq, '000000000')) || '-' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(A.nip_assign_mst_seq, '000000000000')) WHERE B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND B.SSAID = #{said, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
